query_normalized: predicting molecular polarity from smiles strings with machine learning chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it addresses the core mechanism of predicting molecular properties (specifically activity, which relies on polarity and other descriptors) from chemical structures using machine learning, which is the foundational domain of the user's question.
